problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
mechanism: CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway
hypothesis: Combining CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
